basics.name: Ioan Andrés Muñoz
basics.label: Desarrollador Fullstack con amplia experiencia en ofrecer soluciones tecnológicas personalizadas y efectivas
basics.summary: Desarrollador Fullstack certificado con una trayectoria probada en la resolución de desafíos tecnológicos para hoteles, instituciones educativas y empresas de pequeño a mediano tamaño. Especializado en el diseño y ejecución de estrategias digitales efectivas.

work.name: Freelance / Self-Employed
highlights: Built full-stack web applications with React, TypeScript, Astro and Next.js, using Supabase for auth, database, and storage.
Integrated payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal) with webhooks for real-time subscription and plan updates.
Created serverless APIs with Astro + Edge Functions for image processing (Sharp) and automated content generation (Groq).
Managed continuous deployments on Netlify with SSR, environment variables, and SPA redirects.
Implemented role-based authentication systems with Supabase Auth and Row Level Security.
Built modern UIs with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and reusable component libraries.

work.name: CLAROS SOLUCIONES
highlights: Led web platform development with UX focus, achieving improvements in load times and usability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (UX design, backend, QA) to implement intuitive interfaces using React and Vue.
Implemented reusable component architectures that reduced development time for new features.
Optimized web apps through lazy loading, code splitting, and optimized rendering, improving Core Web Vitals scores.
Established quality standards with TypeScript, ESLint, unit testing, and peer code reviews.
Migrated legacy applications to modern frameworks (React), improving maintainability and performance.

work.name: Personal Projects
highlights: Developed full-stack applications with React, Node.js and MongoDB for appointment scheduling and store management.
Built gaming community portals with Discord, Twitch and YouTube integration.
Implemented LUA addons for World of Warcraft with data sync via web API.
Published and maintained open-source projects on GitHub with documentation and deployment guides.

projects.name: Silueta Pro
projects.description: Server-side image processing SaaS for background removal and edge polishing. Features PayPal subscriptions, Free/Premium plans with resolution limits, and Sharp-based processing pipeline.

projects.name: LingoCraft
projects.description: Multi-tenant language learning platform with gamification (XP, streaks, achievements), PayPal subscriptions, role-based access (student/moderator/admin), tutoring via Cal.com, and structured course/lesson content.

projects.name: AgendaYa
projects.description: Multi-role appointment scheduling SaaS with business registration, services, hours, bookings, reviews, and real-time chat. Business owner dashboard with availability management and notifications.

projects.name: BioGalería
projects.description: Biodiversity social network with collaborative cataloging, interactive maps (Leaflet), community-powered identification, gamification (levels, achievements), Stripe subscriptions, and role-based dashboards.

projects.name: Grupo GM
projects.description: Enterprise multi-tenant dashboard with company-based auth, employee management, contracts, audit trail, Ecotech pine monitoring module, and interactive Recharts visualizations.

projects.name: Comunidad Colmillo de Acero
projects.description: Guild community portal with recruitment system, raid scheduler, polls, AI-powered blog (Groq), event calendar, and custom JWT admin panel.

projects.name: Comunidad Raid Dominion Tools
projects.description: Complementary web portal for WoW community with Discord integration, Twitch streaming, YouTube content, and guild management tools.

projects.name: Addon Raid Dominion Tools
projects.description: LUA addon for World of Warcraft 3.3.5a enhancing gameplay with advanced UI customizations, web portal integration, and routine automation.

projects.name: Agenda Contable
projects.description: Full-stack React + Express + MongoDB application for appointment management and accounting ledger, deployed on Google Cloud with RESTful API.

projects.name: Administrador de Tienda
projects.description: Full-stack web system (PHP + MySQL) for inventory control, invoicing, accounting records and user management with persistent sessions and admin panel.

projects.name: Gestor de Estudiantes
projects.description: Complete CRUD system for student management with PHP + JSON, responsive UI, search and filters, ideal for academic administration.

projects.name: Space Invaders
projects.description: Web version of the classic Space Invaders game built with Canvas API, game loops, collision detection and scoring — vanilla JavaScript without libraries.
